summary: Tested Preference Funnel feature - all 4 sections (A, B, C, D) working correctly. Backend API accepts all new fields (brand_limit, price_range, keywords, drop_threshold, alert_frequency, restock). GET /api/preferences returns all fields with defaults. Scheduler status shows both auto_scrape and daily_digest jobs. 21/21 backend tests passed, UI flow complete.
test_credentials: Phone: Any 10-digit Indian number starting with 6-9 (e.g., 9876543210). Sandbox OTP auto-returned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preference Funnel feature fully implemented and tested. All 4 sections work: A) Brand Selection with Top 5/10/Unlimited limits, B) Trigger-Based Filtering with New Drops/Price Drops/Restock, C) Category and Size filters, D) Notification Frequency with Instant/Daily Digest (8 PM). Scheduler has both auto_scrape (15 min) and daily_digest (8 PM IST) jobs.
